Hey Raphael Tan! 
This is Akarsha, founding member at Tinystep. Here's how you can meet your daddy friends and explore the app ☺ 

1. Explore and pick from 1000+ topic based chat groups!
tinystep.in/r/f/exploreGroups

2. Share your most cherished memory as a parent by putting it up on Posts!
tinystep.in/r/f/post

3. Get all your queries answered and guide other dads too on QnA!
tinystep.in/r/f/forum

4. Your birthclub members are already on your friends list! Be sure to say Hi ☺ 
tinystep.in/r/f/autogroup

Chat with me if you need anything ☺
